name: amazon-ads-pp-mcp
description: Amazon Ads MCP server for reports, analytics, keyword optimization, and guarded automation.

amazon_ads_api_client_id.title: AMAZON_ADS_API_CLIENT_ID
amazon_ads_api_client_id.description: Amazon Ads API client ID sent on every API request. Defaults to the same value as AMAZON_ADS_CLIENT_ID in the printed CLI.

amazon_ads_client_id.title: AMAZON_ADS_CLIENT_ID
amazon_ads_client_id.description: Login with Amazon client ID for the Amazon Ads application. Used by amazon-ads-pp-cli auth login --port 8085.

amazon_ads_client_secret.title: AMAZON_ADS_CLIENT_SECRET
amazon_ads_client_secret.description: Login with Amazon client secret for the Amazon Ads application. Used by amazon-ads-pp-cli auth login --port 8085.

amazon_ads_profile_id.title: AMAZON_ADS_PROFILE_ID
amazon_ads_profile_id.description: Optional. Amazon Ads profile ID used as the request scope.

amazon_ads_refresh_token.title: AMAZON_ADS_REFRESH_TOKEN
amazon_ads_refresh_token.description: Refresh token saved by amazon-ads-pp-cli auth login --port 8085 after registering http://localhost:8085/callback as the Amazon redirect URL.
